name: ReasoniXlaw
description: Prefix-cache stable context engine for DeepSeek-compatible models

targetModels.description: Model name patterns that activate prefix-stable mode

prefixLockCount.description: Messages to lock into prefix layer

recentKeepCount.description: Recent messages to keep verbatim in tail

tailTokenBudget.description: Token budget for keeping additional recent tail messages

outputReservedTokens.description: Output budget reserved before considering compaction pressure

maxSummaryTokens.description: Maximum accumulated summary size before recompression

toolResultTrimChars.description: Characters retained from older tool results before trimming
